summary: Backend and mobile-web frontend voice flows validated. Voice-context chat stayed fast and created reminders; Voice screen suggestion flows returned AI text, showed status notice, and preserved task-creation feedback.
action_items: Optional hardening: add stable testID on primary Home container/tab items to avoid text-only fallback selectors in regression automation.
Optional perf follow-up: if Voice-screen text suggestions are expected to use fast model path too, include a voice context in /api/chat calls from sendTextMessage.
critical_code_review_comments: Voice fast path routing is active in backend: /api/chat with voice context uses gpt-4o and completed within threshold during test.
VoiceScreen suggestion flow correctly renders ai response text and status notice without blocking result card rendering.
VoiceScreen sendTextMessage currently posts only {message} (no context), so text suggestions do not explicitly force voice fast-mode path.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of requested voice UI checks passed

seed_data_creation: Created temporary TEST_ reminder tasks via /api/chat during regression tests; cleaned up by test teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated against public preview https://ai-freq-preview.preview.emergentagent.com in mobile viewport (375x667). Confirmed: voice-context reminder creation remains fast; /api/voice/transcribe + /api/voice/process still return ai_response; Voice tab suggestion taps render ai response text, status badge, and task-created badge where applicable.
rca_of_issue: No blocking regressions found for requested scope.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md; file is present but empty. No auth flows were in scope.
